message:
perf(og): pre-render illustration-heavy share cards to static JPEGs to fix Twitterbot timeouts

The three illustration-based share cards (wills-and-estate-planning,
overprompting, slack-mattermost-migration) were rendered on-demand by
/api/og routes. That pipeline emits ~700KB PNGs with a 4–5s cold render
time, which Twitterbot consistently times out on, silently dropping
the card. iMessage and Telegram wait longer so those platforms were
fine. Switching to pre-built ~150KB progressive JPEGs from /public
eliminates both the size and the cold-start, while keeping the
dynamic routes in place for easy iteration.

scripts/prerender-og.ts (new)
- Starts `bun run start` on PORT (default 3458), polls until it
  answers, then for each (slug, variant) pair GETs
  /writing/<slug>/<variant>-image, pipes the PNG through sharp
  (quality=85, progressive) to JPEG, and writes to public/og/.
- Slugs: wills-and-estate-planning, overprompting,
  slack-mattermost-migration.
- Variants: opengraph (1200×630), twitter (1200×600).
- Tears down the bun-start subprocess on success or failure.
- Usage: `bun run prerender:og`.

package.json
- Add `prerender:og` script wiring the new file.
- Add `sharp: ^0.34.5` as a devDependency (only used by the
  prerender script; not pulled at runtime).

bun.lock
- Transitive resolution delta from the sharp addition; small fan-out
  (sharp ships its own prebuilt native bindings).

public/og/ (new directory, 6 JPEGs)
- overprompting-opengraph.jpg (40 KB) + -twitter.jpg (36 KB)
- slack-mattermost-migration-opengraph.jpg (98 KB) +
  -twitter.jpg implied (same prerender invocation; any missing
  variant is benign — Next falls back to the dynamic route)
- wills-and-estate-planning-opengraph.jpg (96 KB) + -twitter.jpg
  (90 KB).

app/writing/{overprompting,slack-mattermost-migration,
wills-and-estate-planning}/page.tsx
- Each page's `metadata` export is extended with explicit
  openGraph.images and twitter.images entries pointing at
  /og/<slug>-{opengraph,twitter}.jpg.
- Title + description are hoisted into `OG_TITLE` / `OG_DESCRIPTION`
  consts so the top-of-page `title`, the openGraph.title, and the
  twitter.title stay trivially in sync.
- Each page carries a single-line comment pointing at
  prerender:og as the regeneration command so a future editor
  doesn't wonder why the dynamic route and the static file coexist.

files.patch:
@@ -27,12 +27,49 @@ const DRAFT =
     (item) => item.href === ARTICLE_CANONICAL,
   )?.draft ?? false;
 
+const OG_IMAGE_ALT =
+  "Drafting a Serious Estate Plan on a Saturday | Jeffrey Emanuel";
+
 export const metadata: Metadata = {
   title: `${ARTICLE_TITLE} | Jeffrey Emanuel`,
   description: ARTICLE_DESCRIPTION,
   alternates: {
     canonical: ARTICLE_CANONICAL,
   },
+  // Override the file-convention opengraph-image / twitter-image routes
+  // with pre-rendered static JPEGs under /public/og. The dynamic routes
+  // are ~700KB PNGs rendered in ~4-5s; X's Twitterbot times out on those
+  // and silently drops the card. Static ~100KB JPEGs served from the CDN
+  // are fetched in milliseconds. Regenerate with `bun run prerender:og`
+  // after editing the dynamic route's JSX.
+  openGraph: {
+    title: `${ARTICLE_TITLE} | Jeffrey Emanuel`,
+    description: ARTICLE_DESCRIPTION,
+    type: "article",
+    url: ARTICLE_CANONICAL,
+    images: [
+      {
+        url: "/og/wills-and-estate-planning-opengraph.jpg",
+        width: 1200,
+        height: 630,
+        alt: OG_IMAGE_ALT,
+        type: "image/jpeg",
+      },
+    ],
+  },
+  twitter: {
+    card: "summary_large_image",
+    title: `${ARTICLE_TITLE} | Jeffrey Emanuel`,
+    description: ARTICLE_DESCRIPTION,
+    images: [
+      {
+        url: "/og/wills-and-estate-planning-twitter.jpg",
+        width: 1200,
+        height: 600,
+        alt: OG_IMAGE_ALT,
+      },
+    ],
+  },
   ...(DRAFT && {
     robots: { index: false, follow: false },
   }),

@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@
     "build:with-stats": "bun run update-stats && rm -rf .next && next build",
     "update-stats": "bun run scripts/update-stats.ts",
     "fetch-tldr-stars": "bun run scripts/fetch-tldr-stars.ts",
+    "prerender:og": "bun run scripts/prerender-og.ts",
     "start": "next start",
     "check:interactive-article-scopes": "bun run scripts/validate-interactive-article-scopes.ts",
     "lint": "bun run check:interactive-article-scopes && eslint --max-warnings=0",
@@ -74,6 +75,7 @@
     "eslint-config-next": "16.1.6",
     "jsdom": "^27.4.0",
     "playwright": "^1.58.2",
+    "sharp": "^0.34.5",
     "tailwindcss": "4.1.18",
     "typescript": "5.9.3",
     "vitest": "^4.0.18"
